member.name: T:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.HealthController
member.summary: Supports operations related to portfolio health checks

member.name: M:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.HealthController.Health
member.summary: Returns a result indicating the health status of basic API connectivity

member.name: M:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.HealthController.Resources
member.summary: Returns a result indicating the health status of all back-end resources that the API depends upon (e.g., database connections)

remarks.para: If is supplied, then the leet is created using the supplied code.
Otherwise, a new leet is created.
In either case, the leet code is returned as an ETag in the response.
This endpoint is an alias for the primary GET endpoint, although this endpoint returns a leet file.
The leet code is returned as an ETag value.

member.name: T:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.PortfolioController
member.summary: Supports operations related to the portfolio

member.name: M:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.PortfolioController.Get
member.summary: Gets information about the API, including documentation sources and navigable routes (synonym: Info)

member.name: M:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.PortfolioController.GetPhoto(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets information about a photo of the artist
member.param: The ID that uniquely identifies the photo
member.remarks: If the identifier is out of range, then information for a random photo is returned

member.name: M:Portfolio.Api.Controllers.PortfolioController.GetInfo
member.summary: Gets information about the API, including documentation sources and navigable routes

member.name: T:Portfolio.API.Controllers.v1.ExhibitsController
member.summary: Supports operations related to portfolio exhibits

member.name: M:Portfolio.API.Controllers.v1.ExhibitsController.Get
member.summary: Gets a list of active exhibits

member.name: M:Portfolio.API.Controllers.v1.ExhibitsController.Get(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets details for a specified exhibit
member.param: The ID that uniquely identifies the exhibit

member.name: T:Portfolio.API.Controllers.v1.WritingsController
member.summary: Supports operations related to portfolio writings, including prose and poetry

member.name: M:Portfolio.API.Controllers.v1.WritingsController.Get
member.summary: Gets a list of active writings
